news.summary: Circus SE, a prominent company in AI software and AI-robotics for the food service sector, unveiled the latest CA-1 Series 4 robot for meal production. This new generation, catered for industrial use, has set a new standard in autonomous food service with notable advancements in throughput, intelligence, and user experience. The robot is scheduled for customer deliveries starting this summer. This announcement was made in Munich and Circus SE can be found on the XETRA stock exchange under the ticker symbol CA1.
news.headline: Circus SE introduces AI-robot CA-1 Series 4 for food service industry, boasting breakthrough improvements. Deliveries to start soon.

news.summary: Investors who followed Eric Trump's suggestion to buy Bitcoin's dip have not witnessed a positive turnaround as the leading cryptocurrency failed to show a bullish reversal. In a post on Feb. 25, the Executive Vice President of The Trump Organization advised to "₿uy the dips" after Bitcoin dropped below $90,000. This recommendation garnered responses from notable figures in the cryptocurrency sector, with Strategy Executive Chairman Michael Saylor praising it as "The ₿est Advice." However, Bitcoin's value continued to decline, reaching $83,158, a 6% drop from the initial dip. For instance, if one invested $1000 following Trump's advice, it would have decreased to $940 by now.
news.headline: Eric Trump advised to buy Bitcoin when it fell below $90,000, but 5 weeks later it dropped to $83,158, a 6% decline.

news.summary: In Mesquite, NV, on April  04, 2025, Dogecoin Cash, Inc. (OTCIQ: CBDS) stated that its subsidiary, PrestoDoctor (www.prestodoctor.com), is launching a special April promotion providing a substantial 42.0% discount on medical cannabis card evaluations and renewals for the entire month, marking their biggest discount to date.
news.headline: PrestoDoctor, a subsidiary of Dogecoin Cash, offers a 42% discount on medical cannabis card evaluations in April - their largest discount ever.

news.summary: Caro Holdings has recently established a strategic partnership with Kisqueya to broaden its ecommerce platform into a global marketplace dedicated to Black-owned enterprises. This collaboration aims to provide more visibility and opportunities for Black-owned businesses, with a significant focus on enhancing their online presence. Through this partnership, Caro Holdings intends to expand its reach and impact, connecting a vast network of Black entrepreneurs with potential customers worldwide. The alliance between Caro Holdings and Kisqueya represents a crucial step in supporting and promoting Black-owned businesses in the ecommerce sector.
news.headline: Caro Holdings partners with Kisqueya to launch global marketplace for Black-owned businesses.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in Stockholm, the company ASSA ABLOY has announced the upcoming release of its Q1 2025 report on April 23, 2025, at 8:00 am (CEST). A conference call and webcast discussing the results will commence at 9:00 am (CEST) and conclude at 10:00 am (CEST) on the same day.
news.headline: ASSA ABLOY to present Q1 report on 23 April at 09:00 am; results released at 08:00 am. Conference call & webcast to follow.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Hublot celebrated the 20th year milestone of its renowned Big Bang watch model with an event at the Geneva Arena during the Watches & Wonders fair. The evening featured a historic meeting between brand ambassadors Kylian Mbappé and Usain Bolt, drawing significant attention.
news.headline: Hublot celebrates 20 years of Big Bang model with Kylian Mbappé and Usain Bolt at Geneva Arena for Watches & Wonders.

news.summary: AQR Capital Management's Chief Investment Officer, Cliff Asness, recently criticized advocates of tariffs, disputing claims that tariffs result in deflation rather than inflation. Asness made his remarks in response to Anthony Pompliano, Founder & CEO of Professional Capital Management and a Bitcoin (BTC) advocate, who argued that tariffs do not lead to inflation. Asness dismissed this notion, stating that such tariffs are detrimental and can ultimately lead to recessions and subsequently cause deflation. The dispute arose as JPMorgan Chase & Co. increased the likelihood of a U.S. recession to 40% from 30%. President Donald Trump's trade policies were cited as a contributing factor to the economic uncertainty.
news.headline: Cliff Asness criticizes tariff supporters for suggesting that tariffs lead to deflation; warns of recession-driven deflation. Character count: 116

news.summary: Niu Technologies, a top smart urban mobility solutions provider, announced its first quarter sales volume for 2025 today. The company reported being the world leader in this industry.
news.headline: NIU Technologies reports first quarter 2025 sales volume results, being a top provider of smart urban mobility solutions.
Outcome of Riksbank auctions for government bonds released, reflecting strong interest with yields averaging around 0.5%.

news.summary: The collaboration between DHL and Temu is broadening to enhance growth opportunities for small and medium enterprises (SMEs) in existing and emerging markets. Emphasis will be on improving logistics efficiency and ensuring adherence to trade regulations to facilitate joint market expansion. DHL will provide backing for Temu's local-to-local program, which aims to make up 80% of their operations in the future.
news.headline: DHL and Temu sign MoU to boost SME growth in various markets, enhancing logistics efficiency and trade compliance.

news.summary: The exhibition "Eclipse of Perceptions" is part of Kia's ongoing commitment to promoting art and culture, showcasing artists from different backgrounds. Through conceptual pieces, the exhibit delves into Kia's design ethos of 'Opposites United,' utilizing mediums such as sculpture, sound, and light. This artistic showcase features a variety of works that highlight the fusion of contrasts.
news.headline: Kia presents 'Eclipse of Perceptions' at Milan Design Week 2025, featuring diverse artists interpreting 'Opposites United' design philosophy.

news.summary: The most recent version of ezPaycheck payroll software has integrated form 943, specifically designed to assist farmers in reducing the time spent on payroll and tax form processing. This updated software is now available for testing on halfpricesoft.com. Based on information released from REDMOND, Wash., on April 4, 2025, the innovative ezPaycheck software aims to streamline financial tasks for farmers and facilitate more time in the field.
news.headline: ezPaycheck now includes Form 943 for reporting agricultural employment taxes, reducing time spent on payroll processing.

news.summary: Nidec Corporation, based in Kyoto, Japan, has announced its decision to acquire common stock shares of Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. on April 3, 2025. This acquisition of the Target Company's Stock, listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange (Securities Code: 6135), will be conducted through a tender offer under the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act. The tender offer, in accordance with the Act No. 25 of 1948, aims to secure ownership of a significant portion of the Target Company.
news.headline: Nidec to acquire common stock shares of Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. through tender offer in Japan, Securities Code: 6135.

news.summary: In Hellerup, Denmark on April 4, 2025, TORM plc (NASDAQ: TRMD) has announced the issuance of 12,406 A-shares, with a total nominal value of USD 124.06, following the conversion of an equivalent amount of Restricted Share Units. This move indicates a strategic expansion in the company's share capital.
news.headline: TORM plc increases share capital by 12,406 A-shares (worth USD 124.06 each) due to Restricted Share Units exercise.
Trump grows impatient as Witkoff meets with Putin envoy in Washington.

news.summary: Al Zeyoudi emphasized that the UAE's position as a global investment and trade hub is demonstrated through hosting significant international events. With over 1,250 speakers participating in over 400 panel discussions, the 14th edition of the AIM Congress is being organized in Abu Dhabi, UAE, showcasing the country's pivotal role on a global scale.
news.headline: AIM Congress 2025 begins in Abu Dhabi with 20,000 attendees. 1,250 speakers, 400 panel discussions. UAE asserts global hub status.
Spain's Economy Minister: The Spanish economy's direct exposure to US tariffs is lower than other EU countries

news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of April 4, 2025, the market for EUV photoresists is categorized by type into EUV (Chemical) and EUV (Non-Chemical), and by application into Logic IC and Memory. In 2024, the global market for EUV photoresists was valued at USD 296 million. It is expected to reach a higher figure as it progresses.
news.headline: EUV market to hit $1.4B by 2031. Valued at $296M in 2024, seeing significant growth in IC and memory applications.
Spain's Economy Minister: US tariffs' impact on Spanish GDP could be various tenths of a percentage point

news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index signified a notable decrease in market sentiment, lingering in the “Extreme Fear” category on Thursday. U.S. stocks experienced a decline, with the Nasdaq Composite falling approximately 6% following President Donald Trump's announcement of new trade tariffs. Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) witnessed a drop of about 9.3%, marking its worst performance since March 2020. Similarly, Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) saw a decline of 7.8%, and Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) plummeted by 9% during Thursday's trading. In contrast, Lamb Weston Holdings Inc. (NYSE: LW) observed a rise of 10% subsequent to reporting third-quarter financial results surpassing expectations and issuing a FY25 sales outlook higher than anticipated. For more details, visit the full coverage on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Nasdaq drops 6% on Trump's tariffs, Apple down 9.3% & Nvidia 7.8%, Greed Index in 'Extreme Fear Zone'. Lamb Weston gained 10%.

news.summary: In Valby, Denmark, on April 4, 2025, H. Lundbeck A/S (Lundbeck) is set to reveal encouraging interim findings from the open-label extension of the PACIFIC trial concerning bexicaserin. Moreover, the company will share fresh insights from clinical trials and real-world data related to eptinezumab. Lundbeck's presentation will include significant updates on the effectiveness of bexicaserin and eptinezumab gathered from ongoing research studies and real-world experiences.
news.headline: Lundbeck presents positive data at AAN, including results from PACIFIC trial extension and new analyses with eptinezumab.

news.summary: Aker Horizons ASA's annual general meeting is scheduled for April 30, 2025 at 13:00 CEST in a virtual format. Key agenda items include the election of Board of Directors members.
news.headline: A virtual AGM for Aker Horizons ASA on April 30, 2025, with focus on electing new Board members.
2024 annual results of Groupama Group show significant growth in revenue and profit.

news.summary: Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE:LEVI) is scheduled to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 7 after the market closes. Analysts are anticipating earnings of 28 cents per share, an increase from the previous year's 26 cents per share. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $1.54 billion, slightly lower than the $1.56 billion recorded a year ago. In its last financial report on Jan. 29, Levi Strauss exceeded expectations with earnings of 50 cents per share, surpassing the estimated 48 cents per share. The company also reported sales of $1.840 billion, beating the projected $1.728 billion. Following this news, Levi Strauss shares fell by 13.7% to close at $14.44 on Thursday. For further details, readers can refer to Benzinga's website.
news.headline: Wall Street experts revised Levi Strauss price outlook before Q1 earnings. Expected 28 cents/share (up from 26) & $1.54 billion revenue (down from $1.56 billion). Shares fell 13.7% to $14.44.

news.summary: In St. Gallen, Switzerland, Geoquip Marine (Geoquip), a prominent provider of offshore geotechnical solutions and a portfolio company of Njord Partners, has recently concluded a €100 million bond offering. This development is expected to enhance the company's financial position, facilitate its expansion plans, and signify a key advancement in its evolution. The bond placement followed a fruitful investor roadshow, showcasing the company's strong market presence and potential for growth.
news.headline: Geoquip Marine secures €100million bond for fleet enhancements and growth; a significant step in maturation and development.

news.summary: U.S. stock futures are down this morning, and investors are likely to focus on certain stocks today. American Shared Hospital Services (AMS) is expected to announce earnings of 1 cent per share on $7.70 million revenue before the market opens. AMS shares rose 0.3% in after-hours trading to $2.97. Guess? Inc. (GES) also reported positive results. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: US stock futures down on Friday, focus on American Shared Hospital Services (NYSE:AMS) reporting 1¢/share on $7.70M revenue. Guess Inc. (NYSE:GES) also reported upbeat results.

news.summary: Paris, France - On April 4, 2025, Eviden, a business under the Atos Group specializing in digital, cloud, big data, and security, disclosed that it achieved a standard-level accreditation from the French National Agency for Information Systems Security (ANSSI) for its Trustway IP Protect solution. This recognition confirms the trustworthiness, strength, and efficacy of the virtual private network (VPN) in safeguarding confidential communications and data.
news.headline: Eviden's Trustway IP Protect VPN gets ANSSI standard qualification, showing reliability and security.

news.summary: SES S.A. recently conducted its Annual General Meeting in Betzdorf, Luxembourg, where shareholders approved all resolutions suggested by the Board of Directors. Among the decisions made were the endorsement of the 2024 annual accounts and a proposed annual dividend of EUR 0.50 per A-share and EUR 0.20 per B-share. This figure comprises the prior EUR 0.25 per A-share and EUR 0.10 per B-share interim dividend.
news.headline: SES AGM voting results: Annual dividend of EUR 0.50 per A-share (EUR 0.20 per B-share) approved, along with 2024 annual accounts.

news.summary: A recent report stated that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 5.2%, marking a rise of 0.3% from the previous month. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 1.3 million. Additionally, it was reported that the stock market index dropped by 2.5% in response to the news. These developments have raised concerns about the state of the economy and future job prospects for many citizens. Authorities are closely monitoring the situation and implementing strategies to address the growing unemployment rate.
news.headline: Nemunas Biknius appointed as CEO of Amber Grid Board for a new term.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) revealed that the Trump Administration's reciprocal tariff policy could benefit U.S.-based automakers. The policy aims to prompt the return of automotive production to the U.S. and assist in creating a favorable environment for this industry. Faraday Future, a California-headquartered global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company, sees this development as a prime opportunity for American automakers.
news.headline: Faraday Future views new U.S. tariff policy as strategic opportunity for automakers. Trump's policy aims to boost production in US. Characters: 120
